message:
fix: route auto-backup queries through retry-wrapped DoltStore methods

Backup export previously called store.DB() to get a raw *sql.DB, bypassing
the DoltStore retry logic for transient connection errors. This caused
auto-backup failures when the Dolt server had brief hiccups, tripping the
circuit breaker unnecessarily.

Add an exported DoltStore.QueryContext() that delegates to the existing
retry-wrapped queryContext(), and introduce a dbQuerier interface so backup
functions accept either *sql.DB or *DoltStore. All backup queries now flow
through the retry path.

Clean rebase of #2186 (by @seanbearden) onto current main.

Co-Authored-By: Sean Bearden <seanbearden@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
